h159fbba4g58ecg4c13g8c3agaaaca457b9f4: Ya got what ya wanted, didn't ya? Stop botherin' us.
hd5f06d59gd908g4a0cg9f32gc10ac8b1008d: Fine - take him, just leave us!
hf7ba971cg631fg40dbg8426gb35314ce7dde: Got nothin' better to do than bother orphans?
h55c70f87gbc05g4434g96e2g257801e36cde: Stupid, dead bastard. Give him a good kickin' - he deserves it!
hd1c5e00ag1381g4e98g89dfg8eda8a97f40d: Yeah! Right in the gnashers! You're all right.
haa471ee7gaa4ag4b68gb345g15dfd9a4cca4: What did he do to deserve that?
h136749edgaf73g4237g9b33g8d9a4943e9eb: He killed my mum and dad! Made a bloody orphan of me.
ha7871b73g8047g4ceegafe0g4e4240e6e0e3: Such insufferable shrieking. May we not kick the child instead?
h3a56e769g280eg40d8g8039g63139bcf83e7: I ain't bothered about it. Better off without 'em. Stupid old geezers should've put up more of a fight.
h03ba3409g7d54g4fa8g9829g842abaf9f95a: Don't mean we can't enjoy puttin' the boot into this pricker-stick though.
hc85da639g126ag450cg8ffeg820ca654a246: Well... So much for my previous sentiment.
h5b54d7bdga403g401agb166g0dea69827b54: Well, yeah. They was nasty old geezers - wanted to cut 'em a raggedy new smile myself some days.
h9f7d711bg8b8dg4b07g8f32g0f9d654ef797: You wot? I ain't explainin' how babies get made. Gross.
h2bde9354g5b42g40e4g9bfeg3954f89ecadf: Understandable then, I suppose. Give him an extra kick for me, child.
hc5def77fgaac9g4f9cga6b2gdd2c62966175: This is no place for a child.
h168a22d9g0619g42a5gb025g4098cb7efcf8: |It will become as monstrous as the parents it lost!|
h6c749c49g8688g4dd7g9faeg656829f0a400: It's as good a reason as any, I suppose.
ha684811bgebecg4bc2g9c2cg35bbe7b75f7e: I almost feel bad for the runt. Almost.
h9de95d35gaca6g475dgbca5g44b6142aaa1c: Loss holds hands with grief - even among goblins.
ha51d6cd4g42e4g4a29g9ef1ge8d779e5f80a: Stop this - you're disrespecting the dead.
heb0a44ecg9ab7g42fbgb1ebg45b7ce9384b0: I'll disrespect you if you don't shut it!
h15e387a8gdf61g43bfga697ga4b4bc148bc0: This nasty worg-pizzle killed my mum and dad! Made a bloody orphan of me.
